Title: First Squad: The Moment of Truth
Director: Yoshiharu Ashino, Aljosha Klimov, Misha Shprits
Writer: Aljosha Klimov, Misha Shprits, Gerard Michael MacCarthy
Actors: Elena Chebaturkina, Mikhail Tikhonov, Damir Eldarov
Plot: Set during the opening days of World War II on the Eastern Front. Its main cast are a group of Soviet teenagers with extraordinary abilities; the teenagers have been drafted to form a special unit to fight the invading German army. They are opposed by a Schutzstaffel (SS) officer who is attempting to raise from the dead a supernatural army of crusaders from the 12th-century Order of the Sacred Cross and enlist them in the Nazi cause.
